## Summary

Describe the user or contributor outcome and the approach taken.

## Acceptance evidence

- [ ] Acceptance test added or updated before implementation
- [ ] `npm run test:boundary` passes when user-visible behaviour changed
- [ ] `npm run typecheck` passes
- [ ] `npm run lint` passes
- [ ] `npm run build` passes

For source behavior changes, list the relevant test cases and manual verification. For documentation, metadata, configuration, or template-only changes, describe the proportionate validation performed instead.

## Risk and impact

- [ ] No credentials, tokens, participant data, or other sensitive information is included
- [ ] Privacy, consent, accessibility, and Indigenous data considerations were reviewed where applicable
- [ ] Documentation and changelog were updated where applicable

Describe deployment, migration, compatibility, or rollback considerations. Write "None" when they do not apply.
